sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (k String, w UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY k;
SELECT k, approx_top_k(2)(w) FROM test_data GROUP BY k HAVING k = ALL (SELECT k FROM test_data WHERE w > 0);
SELECT approx_top_k(3, 5)(k) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT k FROM test_data WHERE w IN (SELECT MAX(w) FROM test_data)) WHERE k IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT k, w FROM test_data WHERE w BETWEEN 1 AND 5;
SELECT approx_top_k(4)(k) FROM temp_data WHERE k = ALL (SELECT k FROM temp_data WHERE w < (SELECT AVG(w) FROM test_data));
SELECT approx_top_k(10)(k) FROM test_data WHERE k = ALL (SELECT DISTINCT k FROM test_data WHERE w IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY k ORDER BY w DESC;
CREATE TABLE boundary_test (bordered Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY bordered;
SELECT approx_top_k(2)(bordered) FROM boundary_test WHERE bordered = ALL (SELECT bordered FROM boundary_test WHERE bordered IS NOT NULL);
SELECT approx_top_k(2)(k) FROM test_data WHERE k = ALL (SELECT k FROM (SELECT DISTINCT k FROM test_data WHERE k LIKE 'a%'));
